Combine WAV Files into a Single WAV File

Source: R/output_functions.R
combine_wav_files.Rd

Reads a list of WAV files and concatenates them in order into a single output WAV file.

Usage

combine_wav_files(wav_files, output_file)

Arguments

wav_files

character vector of paths to WAV files to combine, in the order they should appear in the output.

output_file

character, full path (including filename) for the combined output WAV file.

Value

the full path to output_file, invisibly.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
wav_paths <- list.files("~/my_chords", pattern = "\\.wav$", full.names = TRUE)
combine_wav_files(wav_paths, "~/my_chords/combined.wav")
} # }
